privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated SeisComP FDSN StationXML data. The target new network is "IU", containing 3 stations: "ANMO", "HRV", and "KONO". The starting StationXML path is precisely "/home/ga/Desktop/iu_stations.xml". The required bindings to configure for each station are "scautopick" and "scamp", and the output listing file is expected at "/home/ga/Desktop/network_inventory.txt".
